title: HttpProfile
description: An HTTP profile that defines how the BIG-IP processes HTTP traffic for a virtual server.

acceptXff.description: Whether to accept X-Forwarded-For headers from clients.

basicAuthRealm.description: Realm for HTTP Basic authentication challenges.

defaultsFrom.description: Parent profile from which this profile inherits settings.

encryptCookies.description: List of cookie names to encrypt.

fallbackStatusCodes.description: HTTP status codes that trigger fallback redirection.

headerErase.description: Regular expression for headers to remove from responses.

insertXforwardedFor.description: Whether to insert an X-Forwarded-For header.

oneconnectTransformations.description: Whether to rewrite HTTP connections for OneConnect.

serverAgentName.description: Server agent string to include in responses.

viaHostName.description: Hostname to use in Via headers.
